reason: Item 04 closes existing JAX coverage with two NEW integration parity tests (test_boozer_surface_basic_passes_residual_and_label_parity and test_boozer_qa_wrappers_passes_native_supported_parity). The kernel surface (boozer_residual_scalar / vector / grad / hessian, BoozerSurfaceJAX traceable runtime bundle, IotasJAX / MajorRadiusJAX / NonQuasiSymmetricRatioJAX wrappers, label_constraints_jax) is already exercised by existing benchmarks. The new tests reuse existing JAX kernels at fixed surface DOFs and copy CPU-solved state for QA wrappers; no new compiled hot path is introduced and no public BoozerSurfaceJAX wrapper/adjoint kernel is changed.

production_scale_floor.scale_floor_assessment: The two NEW item-04 integration tests run at the same NCSX smoke resolution used by the upstream example (mpol=5, ntor=5, nphi=11, ntheta=11, 18 coils via nfp=3 symmetry). Production-scale floor for Boozer kernels (nphi>=16, ntheta>=8, ncoils>=4) is satisfied by ncoils=18 and ntheta=11 but NOT strictly by nphi=11. However: (1) the same Boozer kernels (BoozerSurfaceJAX, BoozerResidualJAX, IotasJAX, MajorRadiusJAX, NonQuasiSymmetricRatioJAX, label_constraints_jax) are exercised at nphi=31, ntheta=16, ncoils=20 by tests/integration/test_single_stage_jax_cpu_reference.py via build_real_single_stage_init_fixture; (2) the get_boozer_surface helper with boozer_type='ls' uses nphi=20 ntheta=20 with NCSX 18 coils, exercised by tests/geo/test_boozersurface_jax.py::TestUpstreamFactoryBoozerMatrix LS path; (3) the boozer_surface_basic fixture mirrors the exact resolution used by examples/2_Intermediate/boozer.py (the upstream lab-notebook setting). The floor is satisfied via these existing production-scale fixtures, not the new fixed-state ones.

dense_materialization_budget.exact_newton_dense_jacobian: float64[n_decision, n_decision]; gated by max_dense_jacobian_bytes (default budget plumbed via runtime contract); exact lane is operator-backed at runtime, dense PLU is reporting metadata only
dense_materialization_budget.ls_lane_dense_plu: float64[n_decision, n_decision]; load-bearing runtime data when decision_size**2 * 8 <= max_dense_jacobian_bytes (boozersurface_jax.py:3418-3475, surfaceobjectives_jax.py:3017-3055)

donation_decision.rationale: Public wrappers (BoozerSurfaceJAX, BoozerResidualJAX, IotasJAX, MajorRadiusJAX, NonQuasiSymmetricRatioJAX) keep Optimizable wrapper state alive for downstream Derivative projection; donating input arrays would corrupt the wrappers' coil/surface trees and invalidate subsequent value/dJ calls. git grep 'donate_argnums|donate_argnames' over the 8 in-scope source modules returns 0 hits.
